text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
An Umamusume otaku always rises early. Today,
I'm running in the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting the longest time to see my two
top oshis, T.M. Opera O and Meisho Doto, race
from up close.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I try to control my boiling emotions. I have to
stay serious so I don't offend my idols. That's the
way it has to be done.
